[Historical email excerpt]
Karen Denne
05/01/2001 07:07 PM
To: Kenneth Lay/Corp/Enron@ENRON, Jeff Skilling/Corp/Enron@ENRON, Cliff 
Baxter/Enron@EnronXGate, Steven J Kean/NA/Enron@Enron
cc: Mark Palmer/Corp/Enron@ENRON 

Subject: Baxter Press Release

Attached is a draft press release announcing Cliff's resignation.  This is 
scheduled to be issued tomorrow, following the distribution of the internal 
memo.  Please let me know if you have any comments or changes.

Thank you.
Karen
